ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "state_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the state (e.g., CA, FL, UT) */,
  "state_capital" TEXT /* Capital of the state */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic (e.g., Curriculum, Accountability) */,
  "topic_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subtopics" (
  "subtopic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subtopic */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic that the subtopic belongs to */,
  "subtopic_name" TEXT /* Name of the subtopic (e.g., Foreign Language/Sign Language) */,
  "subtopic_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the subtopic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subtopic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the level (e.g., P-12, Higher Education) */,
  "level_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "law_amendments" (
  "amendment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amendment */,
  "law_id" INTEGER /* ID of the law being amended */,
  "amended_law_id" INTEGER /* ID of the amended law */,
  "amendment_date" TEXT /* Date the amendment was made */,
  "amendment_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the amendment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amendment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "law_repeals" (
  "repeal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repeal */,
  "law_id" INTEGER /* ID of the law being repealed */,
  "repealed_law_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repealed law */,
  "repeal_date" TEXT /* Date the repeal was made */,
  "repeal_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the repeal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repeal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the contribution */,
  "law_id" INTEGER /* ID of the law being contributed to */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., edit, add, delete) */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was made */,
  "contribution_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_contributions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "searches" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Search query entered by the user */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date the search was made */,
  "search_results" TEXT /* Results of the search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_searches_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "education_level_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "law_education_levels" (
  "law_id" INTEGER /* ID of the law */,
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("law_id", "education_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_education_levels" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "education_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "organization_type" TEXT /* Type of organization (e.g., school, district, state department of education) */,
  "organization_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organization_users" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "law_tags" (
  "law_id" INTEGER /* ID of the law */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag for the law */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("law_id", "tag")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the note */,
  "law_id" INTEGER /* ID of the law being noted */,
  "note" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
